scenes.text: Mandy and Sandy are twin sisters.
scenes.prompt: Wide shot, ice castle courtyard scene, Elsa and Anna standing side by side, two blonde princesses, identical body shape and height, matching light pastel long dresses, gentle gaze at each other, fresh winter setting, soft natural light

scenes.text: They both have long blonde hair
scenes.prompt: Medium close-up, detailed rendering of Elsa's long blonde hair, smooth golden flowing hair, delicate features, ice castle background, soft diffuse light, fairytale color palette, high-detail

scenes.text: and are of the same height.
scenes.prompt: Full-body shot, Anna standing upright, standard balanced height proportions, elegant posture, castle terrace scene, pale blue icy color tone, beautiful atmosphere

scenes.text: They usually wear the same dresses.
scenes.prompt: Two-character medium shot, Elsa and Anna wearing identical princess dresses, exact same style and colors, walking side by side along a castle hallway, warm soft indoor lighting, cute and playful

scenes.text: They look the same
scenes.prompt: Two-character front shot, Elsa and Anna with very similar facial features, near-identical faces, smiling at each other side by side, distant icy forest background, cinematic composition

scenes.text: and study in the same middle school.
scenes.prompt: Wide establishing shot, grand ice-castle school complex, Elsa and Anna walking together into the campus, fairytale school scene, snow-dusted environment

scenes.text: Although they aren't in the same class,
scenes.prompt: Split-screen left/right comparison, Elsa walking into one classroom door and Anna into another with different room signs, same school different classes, soft cool color tone, school hallway, fine detail

scenes.text: they have the same PE teacher, Mr Brown.
scenes.prompt: Medium shot of the character, Disney Frozen's Kristoff restyled as a PE teacher, short brown hair, casual sporty outfit, gentle but serious expression, sports field background

scenes.text: It is the first PE class.
scenes.prompt: Wide shot of the sports field, winter outdoor athletic ground, green lawn mixed with snow, PE class scene set up, open beautiful environment, cinematic feel

scenes.text: Mandy and her classmates go to the PE class.
scenes.prompt: Group medium shot, Elsa walking on the sports field with a small group of friends, going together to PE class, lively child-like motion, relaxed cheerful atmosphere

scenes.text: The class begins.
scenes.prompt: Close shot, sports field ground, PE class formally begins, sunlight falling on the ground, clean simple outdoor scene, soft layered light

scenes.text: But when Mr Brown sees her, he is very surprised
scenes.prompt: Close-up, the PE teacher Kristoff frowns with a surprised expression, gaze directed at Elsa in front of him, puzzled look, lively exaggerated expression

scenes.text: and says to her,
scenes.prompt: Two-shot dialogue, the PE teacher facing Elsa, raising his hand in puzzled question, natural body language, blurred sports field background, focus on the interaction between characters

scenes.text: "You had my class just now. Why come again?"
scenes.prompt: Character close-up, the PE teacher speaking with a confused look, perplexed expression, outdoor natural light on the character, delicate Disney facial expression rendering

scenes.text: Mandy is also very surprised to hear this,
scenes.prompt: Front close-up of Elsa, completely surprised expression, eyes wide open, cute slightly stunned look, soft pale icy background

scenes.text: but she understands soon.
scenes.prompt: Half-body shot of Elsa, sudden realization expression, lively eyes, natural emotional shift from surprise to understanding, fairytale color palette

scenes.text: She smiles and says,
scenes.prompt: Elsa smiling in three-quarter view, gentle polite smile, elegant temperament, winter sports field surroundings, soft atmosphere, cinematic still feel

scenes.text: "Mr Brown, you may have made a mistake."
scenes.prompt: Interactive medium shot, Elsa calmly explaining to the PE teacher, relaxed body language, natural communication posture, fresh and healing visual

scenes.text: "I have a twin sister."
scenes.prompt: Memory-feel wide shot, Anna's blurred figure appearing softly in the corner of the frame, suggesting the twin-sister setup, dreamy beautiful effect

scenes.text: Mandy and Sandy are twin sisters!
scenes.prompt: Closing two-character shot, the PE teacher smiling with sudden realization, Elsa standing calmly, with Anna joining beside her, winter sports field wide shot ending, complete and harmonious frame, cute and healing
